title: LittleSkin Plugin
body:
This is a plugin for offline Minecraft servers, loading skins and capes from LittleSkin for players. It supports Paper and Velocity servers for all Minecraft versions after 1.12.2.
Note: Only the server can be in offline mode; the client still needs to use LittleSkin's Yggdrasil external login to display the skin.

⚠️Please note: Except for official verification, LittleSkin recommends using Yggdrasil external login under all circumstances.

Yggdrasil's external login comes with a built-in player skin loading function and provides the same secure and smooth online player authentication experience as genuine authentication.

This plugin is only applicable to skin loading needs in specific scenarios and does not provide any form of authentication functionality. Installing this plugin does not equate to configuring and enabling Yggdrasil external login; your server remains in offline mode.

LittleSkin strongly recommends switching the server to the Yggdrasil external login when the time is right.

For more information about Yggdrasil external login, please see: https://manual.littlesk.in/yggdrasil

This plugin is open source under the MIT license. The open source address is: https://www.mczwlt.net/go-external?url=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2FLittleSkinChina%2FLittleSkinPlugin.
